reviews.comment:
Un DESASTRE se aprovechan que la gente para con hambre y te venden , por ejemplo: empanadas sin recado pura masa , sandwich sin carne y encima muy alto precio

(Translated by Google)
A DISASTER. They take advantage of the fact that people are hungry and sell you, for example: empanadas without any recado, just dough, sandwiches without meat and on top of that, very high prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRdWZMbk1BEAE

reviews.comment:
Para ser una estación de servicio de paso se está quedando en el tiempo, debería mejorar en su aspecto. Los baño con falta de higiene

(Translated by Google)
For a service station, it's showing its age and needs some attention. The restrooms are unhygienic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRMmJIMHpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy sucio

(Translated by Google)
Very dirty
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRbnRTX1NBEAE

reviews.comment:
Baños de mujeres muy sucios, no los pudimos utilizar. Los tachos llenos de papeles, desbordados por el piso, intente cerrar las puerta  y no cierran , no había papel. Decidimos seguir sin utilizar el baño. Una vergüenza

(Translated by Google)
The women's restrooms were filthy; we couldn't use them. The bins were overflowing with toilet paper, spilling onto the floor. I tried to close the doors, but they wouldn't shut, and there was no toilet paper. We decided to continue not using the restroom. It was a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRbW92Sk5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente café buena onda dale personal... lo único te rentas a tomar el café en vaso de cartón

(Translated by Google)
Excellent coffee, great atmosphere, give it a try... the only thing is you have to serve your coffee in a cardboard cup
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRMlBIOWZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre, siempre es bueno parar a distenderse un rato en la estación. Excelente atención.

(Translated by Google)
It's always nice to stop and relax for a while at the station. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURneXAzSUdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre lo mismo. Baños sucios y la atención es poca. La espera para pagar en la estación es mucha.

(Translated by Google)
It's always the same. Dirty bathrooms and poor service. The wait to pay at the station is long.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNneDl1VlNBEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) We stayed overnight here... It's quite safe. It doesn't have a bathroom to shower in.

(Original)
Pernoitamos por aqui.. Bem seguro . Não oferece banheiro para se tomar banho.
